name: Dark Secrets
description: Dark secrets and hidden truths exposed. Conspiracy-like tone revealing the dark side, shocking truths, cover-ups, and things creators or authorities do not want you to know.

structure.hook_rule: Open with the DARKEST, most disturbing fact. Frame it as forbidden knowledge: 'There is something about [topic] that nobody is supposed to know.' Make the viewer feel they are about to uncover a secret.
structure.pacing_rule: Build a slow burn of dread. Start unsettling, get darker with each fact. Use pauses: 'And then... it gets worse.' Short sentences for impact. Let the horror sink in before moving on.
structure.ending_rule: End with an open question that haunts the viewer: 'And the scariest part? This might still be happening right now.' Loop back to the opening secret.
structure.tone: Dark, ominous, like a true crime narrator whispering secrets at midnight
transitions: Nhưng đó chỉ là bề nổi...
Nhưng điều đáng sợ nhất là...
Không ai muốn bạn biết điều này...

prompt_injection: FORMAT: Dark secret exposé. Tone must be ominous and unsettling. Frame every fact as something hidden or suppressed. Use phrases like 'What they never tell you is...', 'Behind the scenes...', 'The truth that was buried...'. Each revelation should be DARKER than the last. The viewer should feel chills. Never use a cheerful or educational tone.
example_hook_en: There is a dark secret about [topic] that was buried for years. And once you know it, you will never see it the same way again.
example_hook_vi: Có một sự thật đen tối về [topic] đã bị chôn giấu suốt nhiều năm. Và khi bạn biết, bạn sẽ không bao giờ nhìn nó giống như trước nữa.
